# Quriov MCP installation and validation index

README.md
  Human overview, capability matrix, security notice, and fixed public contract.

AGENTS.md
  Mandatory safety, scope, secret-handling, immutability, and verification rules.

https://quriovai.com/mcp
  Human-facing capability, key creation, revoke, and onboarding page.

https://quriovai.com/mcp/v1
  The only allowed remote MCP endpoint. Requires a revocable scope=mcp key.
